title: Lookup phone number and open existing project
description: Entering a valid mobile number should redirect the customer to the project URL with a code and resume the form at the current section.

steps.description: Fill 600000001 into the phone number field
Verify the customer lands on a project form URL with a code in the query string
Verify the current form section is displayed

title: Submit project from review when submission is available
description: This test verifies a customer can submit from the review step and see the success confirmation.

steps.description: Verify the success-section confirming submission is displayed

title: Log in and view submitted project list
description: Verifies an assessor can log in to the dashboard and see a list of submitted projects.

steps.description: Verify a list of submitted projects is displayed

title: Open project detail modal from project list
description: Verifies an assessor can open a project’s detail modal from the dashboard project list.

steps.description: Click the control to view a project expediente from the project list
Verify the project detail modal is visible

title: Navigate from review to fix an incomplete item and return to review
description: This test verifies a customer can open an incomplete checklist item to fix it and return to the review checklist afterward.

steps.description: Click an incomplete checklist item to navigate to its related step
Click the continue action on that step to return to review
Verify the user is back on the review checklist step

title: Inspect uploaded documents and extracted data in project detail
description: Verifies the project detail modal displays uploaded document previews and extracted data for the selected project.

steps.description: Click the control to view a project expediente from the project list
Verify uploaded document previews are displayed in the project detail modal
Verify extracted project data is displayed in the project detail modal

title: Apply required signatures and advance to next step
description: This test verifies a customer can apply the required region-specific signatures and the app advances to the next step in the same project.

steps.description: Verify the user advances past the representation step to the next step of the form

title: Download full project ZIP from project detail
description: Verifies an assessor can initiate downloading the full project ZIP from the project detail modal header.

steps.description: Click the control to view a project expediente from the project list
Click the control to download the full project ZIP from the modal header
Verify the browser begins a file download

title: Complete the full 4-step energy certificate survey and reach review
description: This test verifies a customer can complete all four survey steps and confirm to advance to the review step.

steps.description: Fill valid housing data into the step 1 fields
Fill valid openings data into the step 2 fields
Fill valid thermal systems data into the step 3 fields
Fill valid additional info into the step 4 fields
Verify the user lands on the review step for the project

title: Skip energy certificate survey and reach review
description: This test verifies a customer can skip the energy certificate survey and is taken directly to the review step.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the review step for the project

title: Attempt submission when checklist is incomplete blocks submission
description: This test verifies the submit action is unavailable when required checklist items are incomplete and the user cannot submit.

steps.description: Verify review-submit-btn is not visible or is disabled

title: Defer signing and continue without signatures
description: This test verifies a customer can defer signing and proceed to the next step without applying signatures.

steps.description: Verify the user advances past the representation step to the next step of the form

title: Open an individual asset in a new tab from project detail
description: Verifies an assessor can open an individual uploaded asset from the project detail modal for viewing.

steps.description: Click the control to view a project expediente from the project list
Click the control to view an individual asset from the asset actions area
Verify an asset viewer opens for the selected file

title: Download an individual asset from project detail
description: Verifies an assessor can initiate downloading a single uploaded asset from the project detail modal.

steps.description: Click the control to view a project expediente from the project list
Click the control to download an individual asset from the asset actions area
Verify the browser begins a file download

title: Use back navigation within the energy certificate survey
description: This test verifies a customer can move forward and then back within the survey without leaving the energy certificate section.

steps.description: Fill valid housing data into the step 1 fields
Verify the survey shows the step 1 form again

title: Continue is disabled until a signature is present
description: This test verifies the customer cannot proceed with signing until a signature is added and the continue action is enabled.

title: Block phone lookup with invalid phone format
description: Entering an invalid phone format should prevent lookup submission and show a phone validation error.

steps.description: Fill 123 into the phone number field
Verify a phone number validation error is visible
Verify the user is not redirected to a project form

title: Navigate back from representation to the previous section
description: This test verifies a customer can go back from the representation step to the previous step in the multi-step flow.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the previous step of the form

title: Log out and return to dashboard login screen
description: Verifies an assessor can log out from the dashboard and is returned to the login screen.

steps.description: Click the control to log out
Verify the dashboard login screen is displayed

title: Show not-found error for unknown phone number
description: Entering an unknown mobile number should keep the customer on the phone entry screen and show a not-found error.

steps.description: Fill 600000099 into the phone number field
Verify a phone number not found error is visible
Verify the phone entry form remains displayed

title: Export project list as CSV
description: Verifies an assessor can export the dashboard project list as a CSV file.

steps.description: Click the control to export the project list as CSV
Verify the browser begins a file download
